name: claude-code
description: Dispatch Claude Code sessions to build, analyze, and modify code autonomously
author: Sapphire

settings.label: Execution Mode

options.label: System Killer (unrestricted — danger)
options.confirm: System Killer mode gives Claude Code FULL unrestricted access including shell, package installs, and system commands. Are you sure?

settings.help: Controls what Claude Code is allowed to do

settings.label: Workspace Directory
settings.help: Where Claude Code creates project directories (outside Sapphire)

settings.label: Max Turns Per Session
settings.help: Limits how many iterations Claude Code can take per session

settings.label: Coder Instructions
settings.default:
You are a code builder. Write clean, working code.
- Test your work by running it before reporting done
- Include a README.md with usage instructions
- Keep it simple and minimal — no over-engineering
- If you hit a problem you can't solve, describe it clearly in your final response
settings.help: Instructions written into CLAUDE.md in every new workspace. Controls Claude Code's behavior and coding style.
